title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, presents data on rapid adoption of AI coding agents in 2025, reporting that 30 percent of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed and enterprise code generation rose from 15 percent to 75 percent AI-generated in one year. He argues that software engineers are transitioning from writers of code to managers of autonomous AI agents capable of parallel development and end-to-end task completion.
